However, the results seem to focus on Jason Garrett, who coached the team starting in 2010, and Tom Landry, who coached the team in earlier years. Since the question specifically asks about 1996, I need to refine the query to focus on the coaching tenure during that year. I will use the ExecuteSPARQL tool to query for the coach of the Dallas Cowboys in 1996, using the sports.sports_team_coach_tenure.from and sports.sports_team_coach_tenure.to predicates to filter for the correct year.
action:

</tool_call>
